title: Verify statement coverage and exception accounting
preconditions: Complete and incomplete account-period scopes containing reconciled, statement-only, recorded-absent, ambiguous, and other exception outcomes.
steps: Attempt scope completion, query exact class counts and identifiers, verify each eligible transaction and accepted evidence occurs once, then resolve a later exception and re-query current plus historical coverage.
expected: Only complete approved scopes create absence classifications; summary membership and counts reconcile exactly; every eligible prior transaction is reconciled or explicit; later decisions update current classification without erasing history.
